chat.content: Design governance for a research pipeline.
[CONSTRAINT R1 scope=core] operators must not be modified
[CONSTRAINT R3 scope=process] human approval required for any merge
[CLAIM C1 status=active evidence=established] replay is bit-exact reproducible
[CLAIM C2 status=tentative evidence=unclear] mutation rate can scale safely
[DECISION D1 since=t0] one Concept Gate per phase
[DECISION D2 since=t2 replaces=] forbidden-term scanner runs at build time
[DISCARD X1] silent auto-merge after gate pass | reason: violates human approval
[QUESTION Q1] do we audit forbidden terms in code comments too
[QUESTION Q2 blocking] who signs human-approval gates while offline
Let me also mention that on Tuesday we discussed lunch at length; this should NOT be in the state.
